review.verdict: Widest crypto coverage among processors, but UX and trust profile are behind modern stablecoin-first rails.
review.best_for: Merchants wanting to accept a wide long-tail of cryptocurrencies
review.not_for: Businesses wanting regulated fiat rails or modern stablecoin infra
